mapper.sql: id, tran_seq_no, idempotency_key, channel_id, payer_acct_no, payer_acct_name, payer_id_type, payer_id_no, payer_bank_code, payer_bank_name, payee_acct_no, payee_acct_name, payee_bank_code, payee_bank_name, payee_bank_union_code, amount, currency_code, biz_type, purpose_code, remit_info, route_mode, fee_bearer, fee_amount, acp_tran_seq_no, core_serial_no, host_seq_no, host_status, sms_code, device_fingerprint, client_ip, gps_longitude, gps_latitude, tran_status, resp_code, resp_msg, fail_reason_code, fail_reason_desc, tran_timestamp, completed_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transfer_record ( tran_seq_no, idempotency_key, channel_id, payer_acct_no, payer_acct_name, payer_id_type, payer_id_no, payer_bank_code, payer_bank_name, payee_acct_no, payee_acct_name, payee_bank_code, payee_bank_name, payee_bank_union_code, amount, currency_code, biz_type, purpose_code, remit_info, route_mode, fee_bearer, fee_amount, sms_code, device_fingerprint, client_ip, gps_longitude, gps_latitude, tran_status, resp_code, resp_msg, tran_timestamp ) VALUES ( #{tranSeqNo}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{channelId}, #{payerAcctNo}, #{payerAcctName}, #{payerIdType}, #{payerIdNo}, #{payerBankCode}, #{payerBankName}, #{payeeAcctNo}, #{payeeAcctName}, #{payeeBankCode}, #{payeeBankName}, #{payeeBankUnionCode}, #{amount}, #{currencyCode}, #{bizType}, #{purposeCode}, #{remitInfo}, #{routeMode}, #{feeBearer}, #{feeAmount}, #{smsCode}, #{deviceFingerprint}, #{clientIp}, #{gpsLongitude}, #{gpsLatitude}, #{tranStatus}, #{respCode}, #{respMsg}, #{tranTimestamp} )
mapper.update: UPDATE transfer_record SET tran_status = #{tranStatus}, resp_code = #{respCode}, resp_msg = #{respMsg}, completed_time = #{completedTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE transfer_record SET tran_status = #{tranStatus}, resp_code = #{respCode}, resp_msg = #{respMsg}, fail_reason_code = #{failReasonCode}, fail_reason_desc = #{failReasonDesc}, completed_time = #{completedTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE transfer_record SET acp_tran_seq_no = #{acpTranSeqNo}, core_serial_no = #{coreSerialNo}, host_seq_no = #{hostSeqNo}, host_status = #{hostStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM transfer_record WHERE (payer_acct_no = #{acctNo} OR payee_acct_no = #{acctNo}) AND create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM transfer_record WHERE tran_status = 'PROCESSING' AND create_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{timeoutMinutes} MINUTE)
